{"cards": [{"name": "Skyward Magistrate", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, scry 2, then you gain 2 life.
Whenever you gain life, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge flows like healing light through those who seek balance."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius archetype signpost combining white's lifegain and blue's card selection. The flying and scry represent blue, while lifegain is white. The triggered ability creates card selection while maintaining hand size, encouraging a controlling game plan typical of WU decks."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Ravager", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Warrior", "oracle_text": "Menace
When ~ enters, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, ~ deals 3 damage to any target and you draw a card.
{1}{B}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. You lose 2 life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards aggressive sacrifice strategies. The ETB ability converts creatures into damage and cards (black's sacrifice-for-value), while the activated ability provides aggressive reach at a life cost. Menace ensures it can connect for damage in aggressive BR decks."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{5}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": ""Even the longest journey begins with knowing which direction to face."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock with late-game utility. The expensive activated ability provides mana fixing and ramp in the late game when the colorless mana becomes less relevant. Appropriate power level for common - immediate mana help with expensive but meaningful late-game option."}, {"name": "Chronarch's Apparatus", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, scry 3.
{2}, {T}: Target player mills two cards. If both cards share a card type, that player draws a card.
{4}, {T}: Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with multiple activated abilities testing various templating. The mill ability has an interesting condition that sometimes benefits the opponent, while the recursion ability provides late-game value. The scry ETB provides immediate value to justify the 4-mana investment."}, {"name": "Seraphiel, Divine Arbiter", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraphiel", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you may return target creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker embodying white's lifegain and black's life drain. The +1 provides incremental advantage, the -2 is premium removal with white's compensation philosophy, and the ultimate creates a powerful recursive engine. Starting loyalty of 4 allows immediate -2 use while requiring protection for the ultimate."}]}
